title: POV: You Finally Pass the Funded Challenge… Then Blow It in 3 Days
description: That gut-punch moment every funded trader knows. Here's the one thing R2F Trading says you're skipping that costs you everything. Watch to the end. #ICTTrading #FundedTrader #OrderBlocks #SmartMoneyConcepts #FairValueGap #r2ftrading
script: You passed the funded challenge. Day 3… you're down 8%. Account blown. Again. Here's what happened. You traded Monday. No order blocks. No fair value gaps. Just vibes. Smart money doesn't trade on vibes. The fix? We call it the Friday-to-Monday rule. Spend Sunday mapping the order blocks. Every funded trader we coach who does this — 73% fewer blown weeks. Your funded account isn't the problem. Your Sunday prep is. Follow R2F Trading. Free checklist at r2ftrading.com.
